description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the python:3.5 Docker image. Define two stages, test and deploy. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs the before_script pip install -r requirements.txt, then executes py.test --cov-report=html:coverage --cov prob140 --verbose, py.test --cov prob140, and coverage report -m, and publishes the coverage directory as an artifact while capturing the total coverage percentage with the regex /TOTAL.+ ([0-9]{1,3}%)/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that depends on the coverage job, runs only on the master branch, runs rm -rf public, mkdir public, cp -rf coverage public, and cp -rf docs/_build/html/* public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact.
